description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof, featuring a prominent balcony running along the upper floor and a covered walkway supported by columns on the ground level. The exterior is primarily white with black accents, and large rectangular windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The property includes a paved driveway with three parked cars, palm trees, and a small swimming pool with poolside furniture. The rooftop is furnished with lounge chairs and tables, suggesting recreational use. The landscaping is minimal, with a few trees and shrubs placed around the perimeter, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, balcony, large windows, driveway, pool, and rooftop lounge furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, driveway with cars, palm trees, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked cars, palm trees, and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, pool area, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the pool, patio umbrella, and the driveway with cars and palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with a covered porch, supported by columns and flanked by large windows.
